headline: Why Solventum (SOLV) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of healthcare solutions provider Solventum (NYSE:SOLV) fell 3.7% in the afternoon session after Rothschild & Co initiated coverage on the stock with a "Sell" rating and set a price target of $60.
